title: Green enchanted Glint
description: My first project that changes enchanted glint on green enchanted glint on armor and tools :)
body: My first project, I dont like other resourse packs because on new versions armor does not changes but in this project every enchanted glint changes on green enchanted glint. This project took seven days to fix bug with armor enchanted glint. I will be glad if you download this resourse psck :). Made with MCreator
